title: ADR-0006 NextAuth CSRF Same-Origin Invariants
description: Machine-readable invariant SSOT shared by scripts/onprem-verify.mjs (smoke) and scripts/diagnostics/nextauth-csrf-trace.mjs (recurrence trace). Source of truth for ADR-0006 (Same-Origin Reverse-Proxy) verification. Update this file when ADR-0006 is amended.

nextAuthHandlerPaths.comment: Auth.js v5 catch-all handler paths that MUST resolve to frontend NextAuth route (not backend). Subset of NEXTAUTH_HANDLER_PATHS from api-routing.ts — only GET-safe meta endpoints used by smoke test (signin/signout/callback/error/verify-request require interaction).

backendAuthDisjointSample.comment: Sanity check — these MUST resolve to backend (not NextAuth handler). If GET responds with NextAuth JSON shape it indicates nginx routing regression. Subset of BACKEND_AUTH_PATHS from api-routing.ts.

expectedJsonShape.comment: Minimal JSON shape assertions per endpoint. Type names use JSONSchema-lite vocabulary.

cookieInvariants.comment: Auth.js v5 (next-auth@5.0.0-beta.30) cookie security defaults. Verified on the /api/auth/csrf response. v4 'next-auth.*' prefix deprecated — Auth.js v5 emits 'authjs.*' only. v6 migration 시 prefix 변경 가능성 있으므로 본 항목을 같이 재검토 (verify spec이 packages/shared-constants/__tests__/api-routing.spec.ts에서 자동 cross-check).
cookieInvariants.domainPolicyComment: Cookie Domain attribute MUST be unset (host-only) OR exactly equal to the Host header. Wildcard or parent-domain Domain values violate the single-origin model.

responseHeaders.comment: Required response headers and their constraints. proxy chain headers are observation-only (recorded by trace harness, not asserted by smoke).

cacheControlPolicy.comment: NextAuth CSRF responses MUST NOT be cached by intermediaries; serwist /api NetworkOnly rule + a no-store/private Cache-Control are defense-in-depth.

trace.comment: Trace harness supports either deployment env vars or an explicit --origin flag for ad-hoc incidents.

redactionPatterns.comment: Token / cookie / secret values redacted in all log/JSON output. Length is preserved as `<redacted len=N>` to allow length-anomaly detection.

serviceWorkerInvariants.comment: ADR-0006 §Mitigations — /api/* routes MUST be NetworkOnly in the service worker, never SWR-cached.
serviceWorkerInvariants.requiredPattern: /api/.* must match a NetworkOnly handler before defaultCache

nextAuthClientBasePath.comment: Auth.js v5 default basePath is /api/auth. Single-origin model requires no override.

nginxRoutingInvariants.comment: lan.conf (shared by lan + onprem) regex location must match NEXTAUTH_HANDLER_PATHS exactly.

verdictModel.passWhen: all smoke checks return PASS or trace returns 0 invariantBreaches

exitCodes.1: FAIL — invariant breach detected, see report
exitCodes.2: USAGE_ERROR — required env var missing or bad CLI flag
